name: Sunlight Zone
desc: The uppermost layer where sunlight penetrates, full of life and color.

name: Twilight Zone
desc: A mysterious middle layer where light barely reaches, creating a dim environment.

name: Midnight Zone
desc: Complete darkness with extreme pressure and unique adapted creatures.

name: Abyssal Zone
desc: One of the least explored regions on Earth, pitch black and freezing cold.

name: Hadal Zone
desc: The deepest trenches of the ocean, home to the most extreme life forms.

name: Unknown Zone
desc: We're still working and exploring this zone, discovering new wonders.
